basic_details.short_information: CSIR - North East Institute of Science & Technology (CSIR NEIST) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 10 Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) / Driver posts. Candidates with Matriculation or equivalent pass can apply online from 05 May 2026 to 04 June 2026 through the CSIR NEIST website, www.neist.res.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max 25 years for MTS, Max 27 years for Driver

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEIST to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: CSIR NEIST Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 MTS, Driver Posts
